sub_pixel_system.notes: Racing game using Mode 7 graphics; no documented sub-pixel movement system in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Power Sliding
special_mechanics.description: Allows a kart to maintain speed while turning. Executing the maneuver for too long causes the kart to spin.

special_mechanics.name: Hopping
special_mechanics.description: Kart executes a short hop and turns in the air, speeding off in the new direction when it lands. Enables tighter turns.

special_mechanics.name: Boost Panels
special_mechanics.description: Chevron-shaped panels on tracks that increase speed for a brief moment.

special_mechanics.name: Jump Ramps
special_mechanics.description: Short ramps that racers can use to launch themselves in the air. Combined with boost panels allows higher jumps at high speed.

special_mechanics.name: Coin System
special_mechanics.description: Lines of coins on tracks increase top speed when collected. Karts with coins lose one instead of spinning when hit by power-ups.

tier_notes: Tier 1 qualitative data. Wikipedia source contains only high-level gameplay descriptions with no quantified physics parameters, sub-pixel data, or technical specifications. This is a kart racing game, not a platformer, so traditional jump/gravity mechanics are not primary design elements.
